__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*$py.class

# Virtual environments
.venv/
venv/
env/
ENV/

# Jupyter
.ipynb_checkpoints/

# OS / editor files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
.idea/
.vscode/

# Environment files
.env


# Logs
*.log

# Outputs generated by scripts
output/
data/processed_movies.csv

build/
dist/
*.egg-info/
